creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
Any chance of updating this to work with PHP8?  The current release is not PHP8 friendly (e.g. mysql_connect is gone, replaced by mysql_connecti).

The port was last updated 2015

The latest release is 3.1.2 from March 2022 - https://github.com/Kitware/CDash/tags

I tried this morning to get this working. I failed.

Thank ou.
